text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 │ May 2026 │ V 1.2 52 

SAMPLE_GROUP 

LABEL: Medicare Sample Group Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: Medicare 1, 5, or 20% strict sample group indicator. 

LONG NAME: SAMPLE_GROUP 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: 01, 04, 15, null/missing (not included in 20% sample for the year) 

COMMENT: CCW creates the sample values using standard CMS processes to identify the random
